steps.title: Identify point values for each round
steps.content: First round correct responses are worth 3 points each, so $f$ correct responses contribute $3f$ points. Second round correct responses are worth 7 points each, so $s$ correct responses contribute $7s$ points.

steps.title: Build the total points inequality
steps.content:
The total points scored is the sum: $3f + 7s$. The contestant needs to score at least 120 points, which means the total must be greater than or equal to 120. Therefore:
$$3f + 7s \geq 120$$
This is the correct answer.
